title: Mugget's Standing Bear
description: Makes bears stand on two legs | Animated Model | Biome Dependent textures
body:
# Continuing with my Standing Mobs series, here is my standing Bear!
I have animated the model to have a rather cool walk animation which I am pretty proud of, so I hope you enjoy it too! This pack simply remodels the original bear model and also adds brown and black variants of the texture. It uses the CEM method, which requires the **EMF** _and_ **ETF** mods or **OptiFine** to work properly.
| Variant      | Biomes it spawns in |
| ----------- | ----------- |
| Polar Bear      | Snowy Plains, Ice Spikes, Frozen Ocean, Deep Frozen Ocean       |
| Brown and Black Bears   | Every Other Biome        |

## **_Bon Appetit!_**
